name: Aggregate jobs and AI-score them against a candidate profile

parameters.content:
## Aggregate jobs and AI-score them against a candidate profile (single role)

### How it works

This workflow continuously builds a job pool and sends a daily digest of the best matches. Every three hours it gathers jobs from curated ATS boards, Adzuna, and RemoteOK, normalizes and deduplicates them, then upserts fresh records to Supabase. Each morning it pulls fresh jobs, removes already-matched items, scores candidates with Claude, saves qualifying matches, emails a digest, and sends a separate alert if the workflow fails.

### Setup steps

- Configure the schedule trigger time zones for the 3-hour crawler and daily 08:00 digest.
- Set the target role details in the Role node, including role ID, destination email, function, preferred locations, and minimum score if used in the code.
- Add Adzuna API credentials or query parameters required by the Adzuna search request.
- Configure Supabase credentials, project URL, REST API headers, and ensure the jobs and user_job_matches tables exist with the expected columns and conflict keys.
- Add an Anthropic API key for the Claude score batch HTTP request.
- Configure Resend credentials or API headers, verified sender domain, recipient email, and alert recipient for digest and error notifications.

### Customization

Adjust the Search terms node, ATS board list, freshness window, scoring prompt, batch size, and score threshold to target different roles, locations, or job quality criteria.

## Start search cycle

Runs the job discovery process every three hours and defines the search queries used by the upstream job source branches.

## Crawl ATS boards

Builds a curated list of no-key ATS company boards, fetches each board, and parses returned postings into a common job format.

## Search Adzuna jobs

Creates Adzuna API requests for each query, fetches matching jobs, and parses the results into normalized source records.

## Fetch RemoteOK jobs

Fetches RemoteOK listings and parses them into the same job structure as the other source branches.

## Normalize job pool

Combines all discovered jobs, removes stale or duplicate postings, and upserts fresh records into the Supabase jobs pool.

## Start daily matching

Runs the matching workflow each morning and sets the single target role profile, including role ID, recipient email, function, and locations.

## Prepare scoring candidates

Retrieves fresh jobs from the pool, checks which jobs were already matched, removes repeats, and chunks remaining jobs into Claude scoring batches.

## Score and filter jobs

Sends each batch to Claude for fit scoring, attaches returned scores to the original jobs, and keeps only matches above the configured threshold.

## Save and email matches

Stores qualified job matches in Supabase and sends the daily match digest through Resend.

## Handle workflow errors

Catches workflow failures, formats an alert message, and sends the error notification via Resend.

parameters.jsCode:
const q=$('Set Search Queries').first().json.queries||[];
return q.map(w=>({json:{what:w}}));

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ $items().filter(x=>!x.json.__none).map(x=>({user_id: $('Set Role Configuration').first().json.id, job_id: x.json.id, score: x.json.score})) }}

assignments.name: profile
assignments.value: Describe your candidate here: seniority, domain, key skills, and location preferences. Example: Senior <role> with ~N years in <industry>; strong on <core skills>; comfortable with <tools>. Open to remote or <preferred locations>. Not a fit for <roles to exclude>.

parameters.content:
## API keys — how to get each one

**Anthropic (Claude)** — scores the jobs
console.anthropic.com -> Settings -> API Keys -> Create Key (add billing credit).
In n8n: Settings -> Variables/Env `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`, or swap the header to an HTTP-header credential.

**Supabase** — the job pool DB (free tier)
supabase.com -> New project. Then Project Settings -> API:
- Project URL  ->  YOUR_SUPABASE_URL
- `service_role` secret  ->  YOUR_SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY  (server-side only, bypasses RLS)

**Adzuna** — a job source (free, no card)
developer.adzuna.com -> Sign up -> gives an Application ID + Application Key.

**Resend** — sends the digest + alert emails
resend.com -> API Keys -> Create (`re_...`). To send from your own address, verify a domain
(Domains -> add the DNS records); for a quick test, send from onboarding@resend.dev.

**No key needed:** Greenhouse / Lever / Ashby ATS boards and RemoteOK are open JSON APIs.
